title: Deep-Dive Research Note
description: A focused, detailed exploration of a specific development, question, or project. Unlike wiki pages, notes are time-stamped and may become outdated.

status.description: draft=in progress; reviewed=verified and complete; archived=superseded or outdated

trigger.description: What prompted this note — digest item ID, a client question, or personal observation

summary.description: 3-5 sentence executive summary of what this note covers and concludes

key_findings.description: Bullet list of concrete, specific findings — not vague observations

open_questions.description: Things not yet resolved — drives future research

body.description: Full markdown-compatible body of the note. Can be as long as needed.

data_points.description: Specific numbers, statistics, or data cited in the note

related_wiki.description: IDs of wiki pages this note connects to or should update

wiki_update_needed.description: Set to true if findings here should be reflected in a wiki page

content_idea_potential.description: Set to true if this could become a post, video, or training module

author_notes.description: Private observations, follow-up reminders, or caveats
